title: hydrostachys humblotii
intro: Hydrostachys humblotii, also known as the Madagascar water-clover, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Hydrostachyaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydrostachys humblotii include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as a diuretic and to reduce swelling. Hydrostachys humblotii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or applied topically to the affected area.
